name: Castle of Dreams - Dream Show
desc: Add 1 "Castle of Dreams" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Castle of Dreams - Dream Show", then if your opponent controls a monster that was Special Summoned from their Deck or Extra Deck, you can draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Castle of Dreams - Dream Show" per turn.
strings: Add 1 "Castle of Dreams" card from Deck to hand
